entry.title: New GWAC GS00T99ALD0205 awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN SERVICES INC for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: CONTRACTOR TO PROVIDE A BROAD SCOPE OF IT SERVICES INCLUDING NEW AND EMERGING TECHNOLOGIES WORLDWIDE UNDER THE THREE MAIN FUNCTIONAL AREAS: SOFTWARE ENGINEERING, COMMUNICATIONS, AND SYSTEM INTEGRATION

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:legislativeMandates.ns1:otherStatutoryAuthority: OFFICE OF MANAGEMENT AND BUDGET'S (OMB) EXECUTIVE AGENT DESIGNATION AND IN ACCORDANCE WITH CLINGER-COHEN ACT OF 1996.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
